subject: Volcanic rocky canyon or ravine with fire columns rising, no figures — Valakut landscape
description: The art crop shows a dramatic volcanic landscape: a deep rocky canyon or ravine viewed from above or at an oblique angle. Columns of fire or lava-driven flame rise upward through the crevices of dark fractured rock. The upper portion reveals a pale blue-gray sky through the opening of the canyon. Purple and red tones dominate the rock surfaces, with the fire columns providing the primary light source. No figures, structures, or creatures are visible — this is pure environmental landscape painting.
foreground: dark fractured rock surfaces and fire columns rising from crevices
background: pale blue-gray sky visible through canyon opening
emotion: austere power, geological violence, inhuman scale
